idea-plugin.name: Nord Recharged
idea-plugin.description:
Nord Recharged - Arctic-inspired Color Palette for IntelliJ IDEs

A comprehensive theme collection featuring four carefully crafted variants based on the popular Nord color palette, optimized for the new Islands UI.

Included Themes:

  • Nord Recharged Dark - Pure Nord dark theme with Polar Night backgrounds and Snow Storm text
  • Nord Recharged Light - Clean light variant with Snow Storm backgrounds and Polar Night text
  • OneNord Dark Recharged - One Dark distribution with Nord color palette
  • OneNord Light Recharged - One Light distribution with Nord color palette

Features:

  • Full Islands UI compatibility
  • Authentic Nord color palette (#2E3440, #3B4252, #434C5E, #4C566A, Frost & Aurora accents)
  • Optimized contrast for long coding sessions
  • Comprehensive syntax highlighting for all major languages
  • Consistent UI across all IntelliJ platform products

Select your preferred theme from Settings → Appearance & Behavior → Appearance → Theme
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Version 1.0.0

  • Initial release with 4 theme variants
  • Full Islands UI support
  • Complete Nord color palette implementation
  • Optimized for dark and light preferences
